attributes.name: min
attributes.description: This is a minimum value of the slider.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: This is a maximum value of the slider.

attributes.name: precision
attributes.description: The minimum increment value allowed by the slider.

attributes.name: vertical
attributes.description: Draws the slider in a vertical orientation.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The current value of the slider.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the color slider to readonly mode.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Sets the color slider to disabled.

attributes.name: hide-value-label
attributes.description: Hides the value label under the slider.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components
